hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(/\.sr[wdumafsjpq]$/i.test(f)){const n=f.split(/[\\/]/).pop(); console.log('\n⚠ Fichier PowerBuilder modifie: '+n); console.log('  → Valider la syntaxe: pb_validate_syntax(object_name=\"'+n.replace(/\.sr.$/,'')+'\")'); console.log('  → Compiler: pb_compile'); console.log('')}"
